Records.description: Non-planar double box with one massive propagator for light $N_f$ two-loop corrections to $gg \to t\bar{t}$. Three master integrals with propagator powers $\{1,1,1,1,0,0,1,1,1\}$ and irreducible numerator insertions $k_1 \cdot k_2$ and $(k_1 \cdot k_2)^2$. Most involved topology in the paper. Thresholds in all three channels $s, t, u$. Results in GPLs with argument $y$ and weights $\{-1, 0, -x, -1/x, -(1+x^2)/x, -(1-x+x^2)/x\}$ or argument $x$ and weights $\{-1, 0, 1, [1+o^2], [1-o+o^2]\}$. Coproduct-augmented symbol analysis yields simplifications for poles in $\varepsilon$. Mellin-Barnes representation given in Appendix A.

Non-planar double box with one massive propagator for light N_f two-loop corrections to gg -> tt-bar. Three master integrals with propagator powers {1,1,1,1,0,0,1,1,1} and irreducible numerator insertions k1.k2 and (k1.k2)^2. Most involved topology in the paper. Thresholds in all three channels s, t, u. Results in GPLs with argument y and weights {-1, 0, -x, -1/x, -(1+x^2)/x, -(1-x+x^2)/x} or argument x and weights {-1, 0, 1, [1+o^2], [1-o+o^2]}. Coproduct-augmented symbol analysis yields simplifications for poles in epsilon. Mellin-Barnes representation given in Appendix A.
